hero.title: We operate in the non-visible layer

caption.line1: What you see is not the work · It's the surface
caption.line2: The value sits beneath: context, timing, execution

position.label: POSITION
position.title: We read signals. We design routes. We protect the edge.
position.statement: Althara is a private intelligence channel for operators. We deliver dossiers and action routes so you can decide earlier—under minimal exposure.
position.paragraph: Althara turns weak signals into clear decisions: context, constraints, and timing windows. Everything runs through a private channel with curated access.
position.tab1_body: Compressed intelligence for operating: what shifts, why it matters, and when it activates
position.tab2_body: From intent to execution: sequence, actors, access, discretion
position.tab3_body: A framework for ambiguity: thresholds, risks, next step
position.inPracticeExample: An operator used our route to act before the narrative turned: clear trigger, defined sequence, minimal exposure.

method.label: METHOD

phase1.title: CAPTURE

method.finalLine: We don't sell certainty · We build operational edge

quote1.text: They didn't give us answers. They gave us a map.

quote2.text: The value was timing, not information.

quote3.text: Finally, a framework that respects privacy.

contactModal.title: Contact Althara
contactModal.description: Private access to dossiers, signals, and action routes for operators. Send your request and we'll reply privately.

messages.success: Got it. We'll contact you privately.

hero.tagline: The best assets never reach the portals.
hero.sub: Private access, verified analysis and full confidentiality.

thesis.label: The thesis
thesis.p1: The deals with real upside change hands before reaching any portal.
thesis.p2: Our job is to put you in that conversation.
thesis.quote: Discretion is not opacity. It is method.

layers.title: What we do
layers.intro: Four steps between a signal and a signature.

items.title: Signals
items.text: Debt, inheritances and portfolios that demand silence. We detect the opportunity at source.

items.title: Analysis
items.text: Registry, market and real comparables. A verifiable dossier.

items.title: Access
items.text: Each asset, only in front of the mandates that fit.

items.title: Closing
items.text: NDA, due diligence and signing. We stay until the end.

method.title: Method
method.intro: Slow to announce. Fast to execute.

steps.title: Origination
steps.text: The signal arrives through our own network, never a portal.

steps.title: Verification
steps.text: Ownership, encumbrances and real condition, checked against official sources.

steps.title: Valuation
steps.text: The price is defended with transaction data, not adjectives.

steps.title: Matching
steps.text: Fewer eyes on the asset, higher chance of closing.

steps.title: Execution
steps.text: Data room, NDA and signing. Fully traced.

portal.label: Private portal
portal.intro: Every project has its own library of verified documents, protected by NDA and fully traceable.

features.title: Invitation only
features.text: Every account is opened by Althara. No public sign-up.

features.title: Digital NDA
features.text: One signature unlocks all confidential documentation.

features.title: Protected documents
features.text: Short-lived links and a personal watermark on every download.

features.title: Fully traced
features.text: Every view and download is recorded.

portal.note: No invitation? Request access and we will assess your mandate.

finalCta.label: Access
finalCta.sub: Tell us your mandate. If there is a fit, we open the door.

footer.mantra: The visible market is the tip of the iceberg.
